content: Review research findings and decide on implementation approach
activeForm: Reviewing research findings and deciding on implementation approach

content: Fix call logging system (attempts counter and call_log table)
Fix 30-day drop rate calculation (currently using 30 minutes - TCPA violation)
Add wrap-up time tracking to prevent over-dialing
Implement live call monitoring with ChanSpy
Redesign disposition system with callback delays
Improve dial ratio algorithm using VICIdial approach
